requirements.description_en: Locate the The Labyrinth transit on Shoreline.
requirements.description_ja: ShorelineでThe Labyrinthへの経由地点を特定してください。

requirements.description_en: The transit is located in the basement of the health resort west wing and requires the Knossos LLC facility key.
requirements.description_ko: 이동 지점은 헬스 리조트 서관 지하에 위치하며, Knossos LLC facility key가 필요합니다.
requirements.description_ja: この場所はHealth Resort西棟の地下にあり、Knossos LLC facility keyが必要です。

objectives.description_en: Ask the traders about the underground facility
objectives.description_ja: トレーダーに地下施設について尋ねる

children.description_en: (Optional) Ask Therapist how to access the underground facility
children.description_ko: (선택) 테라피스트에게 지하 시설에 접근하는 방법을 물어보세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）地下施設へのアクセス方法をTherapistに尋ねる

objectives.description_en: Wait for Jaeger to gather the keycards
objectives.description_ja: Jaegerがキーカードを集めるのを待つ

objectives.description_en: Figure out what happened to the BEAR squad
objectives.description_ko: BEAR 분대에 무슨 일이 일어났는지 파악하세요.
objectives.description_ja: BEAR部隊に何が起きたのかを突き止める

children.description_en: (Optional) Locate the entrance to the underground facility beneath the Health Resort
children.description_ko: (선택) 해안선 헬스 리조트 아래에 있는 지하 시설 입구를 찾으세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）Health Resortの下にある地下施設への入り口を特定する

children.description_en: (Optional) Locate the traces of the BEAR squad in The Labyrinth
children.description_ja: （任意）The LabyrinthでBEAR部隊の痕跡を特定する

children.description_en: (Optional) Investigate the BEAR squad regroup spot at Item 1156
children.description_ko: (선택) Item 1156에 있는 BEAR 분대 재집결지를 조사하세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）Item 1156にあるBEAR部隊の再集結地点を調査する
（任意）部隊リーダーを特定する

children.description_en: (Optional) Gather more information about the squad
children.description_ko: (선택) 분대에 대한 더 많은 정보를 수집하세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）部隊に関する詳細情報を収集する
（任意）5人のラボ職員の遺体を調査する
（任意）ロックされたオフィスにアクセスする

objectives.description_en: Listen to the audio tape from the office
objectives.description_ja: オフィスで見つけたオーディオテープを聴く

objectives.description_en: Hand over the audio tape to Jaeger
objectives.description_ja: オーディオテープをJaegerに渡す

objectives.description_en: Read the Labyrinth facility research report
objectives.description_ja: Labyrinth施設の調査報告書を読む

children.description_en: (Optional) Locate and obtain the Labyrinth facility research report
children.description_ko: (선택) 미궁(Labyrinth) 시설 연구 보고서를 찾아 획득하세요.
children.description_ja: （任意）Labyrinth施設の調査報告書を特定し、入手する
